case_title: MARKEE, JIM A. VS SOMA DANCE CLUB INC.

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT SOMA DANCE CLUB INC.
WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT SOMA DANCE CLUB INC.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MARKEE, JIM A. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SOMA DANCE CLUB INC. $1,005.00 PRINCIPAL, $55.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,060.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
WRIT RETURNED WRIT OF EXECUTION ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, FULLY SATISFIED IN THE SUM OF $1,122.19 AS TO DEFENDANT SOMA DANCE CLUB INC.
